ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CONTAINS( copado__JobExecution__r.copado__DataJson__c , "deploymentDryRun\" : false"), copado__JobExecution__r.copado__Template__r.Name = "SFDX Vlocity Deploy", copado__JobExecution__r.copado__Destination__r.Name = "T3Test", $Permission.canDeploy = FALSE )
